name: typography-editor
description: Typography editor with enhanced font library and CSS fallback chains for proper font degradation
author: Spwig

1.1.0: Extended font library from 20 to 65+ fonts including popular Google Fonts
Added proper CSS fallback chains for all fonts (e.g., 'Montserrat', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif)
New font data structure with fallbacks, subcategory, weights, and popularity fields
Reorganized font dropdown with clear category groupings (System Fonts / Google Fonts)
Added subcategory labels (Sans-Serif, Serif, Monospace, Display) within each section
Fonts sorted by popularity for better discoverability
Added variable font indicator badge for fonts like Inter and Fraunces
Smart Google Fonts loading - also loads fallback fonts from the chain if needed
Added getFontFallbackStack() helper for generating complete font stacks
Updated parseInitialValue() to extract primary font from fallback stacks for backward compatibility
Increased dropdown max-height to 400px to accommodate larger font list
Added custom scrollbar styling for the font dropdown
Improved search functionality that hides category headers during search
Added RTL support for font badges
1.0.1: Replaced all hard-coded colors with admin theme CSS variables
Updated popup to use utility-popup, utility-header, utility-body, utility-footer classes
Updated button backgrounds to use var(--input-bg)
Updated button borders to use var(--border-color)
Updated button text to use var(--body-fg) and var(--muted-fg)
Updated active states to use var(--selected-bg) and var(--selected-fg)
Updated hover states to use var(--darkened-bg)
Fixed font dropdown width overflow with max-width and overflow styles
Added custom typography-btn styles for footer buttons (not util-btn)
Improved font dropdown display with ellipsis and better sizing
Removed @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) overrides - now uses theme variables
Improved consistency with admin interface design and border editor utility
1.0.0: Font family, size, weight, style controls
Line height, letter spacing, word spacing
